results.title: The Disturbing Reality of Cobalt Mining for Rechargeable Batteries
results.reason: High reach and compelling storytelling by Siddharth Kara provide a powerful, accessible introduction to the ethical and supply chain realities of the element.
summary: Learn where battery materials come from

results.title: Cobalt - Periodic Table of Videos
results.reason: The gold standard for chemistry education; it explains the actual chemical properties and reactions of cobalt with expert clarity and visual evidence.
summary: Learn about cobalt as a chemical element
See how the metal looks and acts
Discover common uses for this blue material
Understand its place on the periodic table

results.title: Special report : Inside the Congo cobalt mines that exploit children
results.reason: A concise, high-production journalistic report that clearly explains the link between the mineral and consumer electronics for a general audience.
summary: See the dangerous conditions inside the mines
Learn about children working in the mud

Discover who buys the mined materials

results.title: How cobalt mining became a disaster for Congolese communities | DW News
results.reason: DW News offers a well-structured educational overview of the socio-economic disaster caused by cobalt demand, highly praised for its clarity.
summary: Learn how mining ruins local environments

results.title: The horror of cobalt mining in DR Congo | The Listening Post
results.reason: Provides a deeper look into the geopolitical and media narrative surrounding cobalt mining, suitable for beginners interested in the global impact.
summary: Explore the human cost of modern technology
